work_decision_records.decision_question: Should we implement all 24 execution layers at once or phase them?
options_considered: Phase 1 (4 core layers: L52, L53, L54, L56) then iterate
work_decision_records.selected_option_id: Phase 1 (4 core layers: L52, L53, L54, L56) then iterate
work_decision_records.rationale: Assessment document (docs/architecture/EXECUTION-LAYERS-ASSESSMENT.md from Session 40) explicitly recommends phased approach. Aligns with fractal DPDCA principle: validate smallest viable unit first, then proceed. Reduces risk of schema complexity overwhelming adoption. User confirmed: 'you have the helm' - empowered to make engineering decisions within documented strategy.
work_decision_records.notes: Phase 1 provides complete execution loop (work → events → decisions → outcomes) sufficient for 51-ACA ground-up development to start. Phase 2-6 can be added incrementally as operational patterns emerge.
